description: User clicked a primary CTA button on the landing page (e.g. 'Start Free Trial', 'Start for $149'). Captures the conversion funnel entry point.
User clicked the CTA for a specific pricing tier on the landing page.
User interacted with the ROI calculator on the landing page (slider moved).
User successfully created a new shop (auto-repair location). Key activation event.
User saved AI agent configuration (voice, name, greeting, system prompt, upsell settings). Indicates setup completion.
User successfully connected a third-party integration (Google Calendar, HubSpot, Shopmonkey, etc.).
User initiated a subscription checkout session (clicked upgrade/subscribe). Captures conversion intent with tier and billing cycle.
Stripe webhook confirmed checkout.session.completed — subscription was successfully purchased. Server-side event.
Stripe invoice payment failed. Server-side event for churn risk detection.
Stripe subscription was deleted/cancelled. Server-side churn event.
User clicked the partner program CTA on the landing page, signaling intent to join the partner/affiliate program.
User viewed a call scorecard for a specific call. Indicates engagement with call quality analytics.
